messages.body: Compose a message with '+ To Claude', then tap 'Export for Claude' and paste it into the Claude chat (or let the local mirror + adb pull carry it to the laptop). Claude reads the thread and replies by adding fromClaude messages; apply them with Data → Apply update (paste/file). Per-field merge keeps both sides' messages.

messages.topic: Roadmap synced to your task apps
messages.body: I've put your full roadmap into Taskly (as a nested task tree) and Workboard (as milestones + tasks + a decisions queue + worklog). Open each and tell me which design fits you best. Dispatch (this view) is your inbox to send me tasks - try the two drafts below: edit and tap 'Export for Claude'.
Walk me through the store and pricing decisions one at a time, simply, with a recommendation for each.
Rebuild the Mac app so it reads from the new workspace and finish the M2 cutover.
